name: Worm Kinfet
description:
Parasitic worm that invades people's guts to warm up and live in them, he intends to make you his hosts but your smell stimulates a new flame in his little worm body...

First bot I've made so take it easy on me😫

English is not my native language, I have bad English so I made it with the translator to prevent mistakes,

Surely there must be mistakes sorry~

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Guys, I'm going to redo this bot, I don't know when

I'm not going to deprive the bot, because it looks like you liked it I'm going to redo it and organize its information to make it easier for you who read it.

this worm is supposed to be more silly and innocent who does dirty things without knowing how perverted he is
